title: Candle Genome Scanner [forexobroker]
thesis_bullets: TradingView indicator: Candle Genome Scanner [forexobroker] by forexobroker.
Candle Genome Scanner goes beyond simple pattern identification.

While most candlestick scripts just flag patterns, this scanner analyzes the "DNA" of each candle formation — detecting 28 patterns, measuring their historical reliability on the current instrument, grouping aligned signals into cluster signals, and giving you a clear directional bias based on real follow-through data.
WHAT IT DOES The indicator scans every confirmed bar for 28 candlestick patterns across three categories … Candle Genome Scanner goes beyond simple pattern identification.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
